assertions.title: Homepage movement board has visible area/line charts

steps.observed: Homepage loaded with 实时异动榜 (Movement Board) showing 7 direction rows

steps.action: Inspect SVG elements in movement board table rows
steps.expected: SVG charts >=100px wide x 40px tall with path elements
steps.observed: 7 SVG elements found in table rows, each 120x48px with viewBox '0 0 120 48'. Each has 2 paths: one with gradient fill (area) and one with stroke (line)
Path 'd' attributes contain 14 coordinate pairs matching movement_history data. Area path uses gradient fill, line path uses colored stroke (#d97706 for 短热噪音, #4b5563 for 需要补证据)

evidence.domInspection: 7 SVGs in table rows: 120x48px each, viewBox='0 0 120 48', 2 paths per SVG (area fill with gradient + line stroke)

assertions.title: Direction detail has prominent 14-day trend area chart

steps.expected: Direction detail page for 廓形风格 loads
steps.observed: Direction detail page loaded showing 廓形风格 with 14天趋势图 section
SVG is 800x180px with viewBox '0 0 800 180' — well exceeds minimum requirements

steps.action: Verify area fill and line paths
steps.expected: Area chart with gradient fill and stroke line
steps.observed: 2 paths: area path with gradient fill 'url(#gradient-...)' and line path with stroke '#d97706'. 14 circle elements for data points
4 text elements: '第1天', '第14天' (x-axis), '42', '19' (y-axis min/max values)

evidence.domInspection: 1 SVG: 800x180px, viewBox='0 0 800 180', 2 paths (area+line), 14 circles (data points), 4 text elements (axis labels: 第1天, 第14天, 42, 19)

assertions.title: Charts are pure SVG, no external libraries

steps.action: Search all HTML files for external charting library script tags
steps.expected: No d3, chart.js, plotly, recharts, highcharts, echarts, apex references
steps.observed: All 5 HTML files only reference local scripts: js/data.js, js/components.js, js/nav.js. No external library script tags found

steps.action: Search JS files for import/require of charting libraries
steps.expected: No import or require statements for charting libraries
steps.observed: No import or require statements found in any JS files

steps.action: Search for CDN references to charting libraries
steps.expected: No CDN URLs for d3js, chartjs, plotly, highcharts, echarts, apexcharts

steps.action: Verify SVG elements use document.createElementNS (vanilla JS)
steps.expected: Charts created programmatically without library abstractions
steps.observed: All SVG charts use viewBox and contain raw path/circle/text elements — consistent with vanilla JS SVG creation per AGENTS.md coding conventions

evidence.sourceCodeSearch: Grepped dashboard/ for: d3, chart.js, plotly, recharts, highcharts, echarts, apex in script tags, import statements, and CDN URLs. Zero matches. Only local script sources: js/data.js, js/components.js, js/nav.js

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. Homepage sparkline charts (120x48px, area+line) render for all 7 directions. Direction detail trend chart (800x180px) shows 14-day movement with area fill, line, data points, and axis labels. No external charting libraries used — all charts are pure SVG/vanilla JS.
